sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current centers after clicking right green
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        for child_id in n['children']:
            for cn in seg['nodes']:
                if cn['id'] == child_id:
                    print(f"Center: color={cn['color']} at ({cn['boundary'][0][0]},{cn['boundary'][0][1]})")

# Build full transition table from ALL mouse clicks in history
print("\nFull click history with center states:")
for i, h in enumerate(history):
    a = h.action
    if 'MOUSE' in str(a):
        seg = h.frame.segmentation
        centers = {}
        for n in seg['nodes']:
            if n['color'] == 'N':
                b = n['boundary']
                cols = [p[1] for p in b]
                min_col = min(cols)
                for child_id in n['children']:
                    for cn in seg['nodes']:
                        if cn['id'] == child_id:
                            centers[min_col] = cn['color']
        left_c = centers.get(30, '?')  # left green
        right_c = centers.get(39, '?')  # right green
        print(f"  Step {h.frame.step}: {a} -> Left={left_c}, Right={right_c}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
